issues.why: Missing from runtime — Resend cannot authenticate; live email blocked
remediation: Open https://resend.com/api-keys and create/copy a key for the SRS Resend account
Leave placeholder empty in `.env.local.example` / `.env.example` documentation only
Restart Node/tsx / Next.js so the process loads the new env

remediation: Do not use `log` or `outbox` for live reminder delivery

issues.why: Resolved From falls back to HR (humanresource@srsmerchandising.com) — unsafe for recruiting reminders
remediation: Confirm the mailbox is on a Resend-verified domain

issues.why: Reply-To not explicitly set for recruiting reminders
